title: Import ai-config repo contents into bootstrap repo
description: Merge or incorporate the contents of the ai-config repository into this bootstrap repo so AI tooling configuration is managed in a single place.

title: Import Terminal configuration into bootstrap
description: Add Terminal.app (or iTerm2/Warp) configuration files to the bootstrap repo so terminal settings are managed and deployed via Ansible.

title: Check and update system hostnames
description: Audit current hostnames for all managed systems (mbp2022, lemp9) and ensure they are correctly configured and consistent with Ansible inventory definitions.

title: Import superpowers plan into beads as epic with tasks
description: Translate the superpowers implementation plan into a Beads epic with child tasks, dependencies, and acceptance criteria. This epic will represent the superpowers adoption initiative for this bootstrap repo.

title: Rename master to main and update GitHub
description: Rename the default branch from 'master' to 'main' in both the local repo and on GitHub. Update any references to 'master' in config files, CI, or documentation.
